title: Pentagonocarpus sagittatus
taxonomy: Pentagonocarpus sagittatus is a member of the family Fabaceae. It is a genus of plants native to tropical regions of Africa. The species Pentagonocarpus sagittatus belongs to the kingdom Plantae and is further classified into the phylum Magnoliophyta and class Magnoliopsida. The order Fabales and family Fabaceae are the higher taxonomic ranks for this species. Additionally, it is often classified as a shrub or small tree within the plant kingdom.

intro:
